questions.question: Explain the purpose of the AndroidManifest.xml file and list three important elements it contains.
expectedPoints: Specifies permissions required by the app
Defines minimum and target SDK versions

questions.question: Compare and contrast the res/ directory and assets/ directory in terms of their purpose, how they are accessed, and when to use each.
expectedPoints: res/ contains compiled resources accessed via R class
assets/ contains raw files accessed via AssetManager
res/ supports configuration qualifiers, assets/ does not
Use res/ for images, strings, layouts; use assets/ for game data, custom fonts, pre-loaded databases
res/ files are optimized during build process
